CONTENT.Career: Sidibé was a youth product of various clubs in Paris, before moving to Toulouse in 2017. He made his professional debut with Toulouse in a 1–0 Coupe de la Ligue loss to Lorient on 31 October 2018.On 23 August 2021, Sidibé moved on a season-long loan to Quevilly-Rouen. On 13 August 2022, he returned to Quevilly-Rouen on a two-year contract.On 21 August 2023, Sidibé joined Guingamp on a three-year contract.
CONTENT.Personal life: Sidibé was born in Montreuil, France and has French nationality. He is of Malian descent.
CONTENT.External links: Kalidou Sidibé – French league stats at LFP – also available in French (archived)Kalidou Sidibé at SoccerwayTFC Profile

SUMMARY: Kalidou Sidibé (born 28 January 1999) is a French professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for  Ligue 2 club Guingamp.
